title: Desigual partial scrape handoff and publish

messages.text: Continue the non-Amazon scrape queue, avoid already-scraped sites, finish the active scrape, document it, and update remote git, S3, and the transcripts table.

Selected desigual_com from triage after prior sites were handled or skipped. Created the active claim at /Users/briannasinger/Projects/FWM_Data/non-amazon/data/step_1_raw_scraping_data/_active_scrape_claims/desigual_com.claim.

Read the standard scrape rules and triage plan. Probed only public Desigual resources: homepage, robots.txt, sitemap index, product sitemap, and public product pages. Found Salesforce Commerce Cloud product pages with embedded :initial-product JSON and deterministic catalog model measurements, size, and images. Did not find a usable public customer-review media feed.

Ran a verified 20-product smoke scrape. Saved /Users/briannasinger/Projects/FWM_Data/non-amazon/data/step_1_raw_scraping_data/desigual_com/desigual_com_reviews_matching_amazon_schema.csv with 5 catalog-model rows and saved the matching summary JSON. Metrics: products_discovered 2810, products_scanned 20, products_excluded 15, rows_written 5, distinct_images 5, rows_with_any_measurement 5, rows_with_customer_image 0, rows_with_catalog_model_image 5, rows_with_customer_ordered_size 5, rows_supabase_qualified 0, rows_catalog_model_qualified 5.

Restarted the full public product-page pass, but it was too slow for the repeatedly interrupted thread. A full run reached 200 of 2810 products with 29 rows and 171 exclusions before being manually stopped. No 429, captcha, WAF, HTTP 403, or challenge page was observed before stopping. Decided to publish the smoke result only as an explicitly partial catalog-model evidence file so downstream readers do not confuse it with a completed customer-review scrape.

Documented the result in /Users/briannasinger/Projects/FWM_Repo/data-pipelines/non-amazon/docs/desigual_scrape_2026-05-11.md. Updated the summary JSON with run_status partial_smoke_verified_full_run_deferred and a status note. Closed the active claim and wrote /Users/briannasinger/Projects/FWM_Data/non-amazon/data/step_1_raw_scraping_data/_claims/desigual_com.txt.

Verified the scraper compiles with python3 -m py_compile. Committed the Desigual documentation to git after rerunning the repo Playwright precommit hook outside the sandbox; all 5 tests passed. Pushed commit 9978cf0 to origin/main.

Ran S3 sync with FWM_AWS_PROFILE=default because the configured fwm AWS profile was missing. Sync succeeded and S3 listing verified desigual_com_reviews_matching_amazon_schema.csv and desigual_com_reviews_matching_amazon_schema_summary.json under s3://fwm-scraping-data-briannasinger/non-amazon/data/step_1_raw_scraping_data/desigual_com/.

next_steps: Resume Desigual later only if a longer-running job is acceptable or the scraper is enhanced with checkpointing/concurrency.
Treat current Desigual output as partial catalog-model evidence only, not a completed customer-review scrape.
Use FWM_AWS_PROFILE=default in this environment unless the fwm AWS profile is restored.
